// EmpyreanAlteration: Reading order: every // key is documentation; the following keys are real settings in the same order. Many tuning dictionaries live in C# defaults until you add them here; this file ships growth mutator knobs plus quest item leveling (moved from Overtinked). Shipped defaults turn the mod on and allow all equippable gear to level; refine per-slot outcomes via QuestGrowthSalvageRules, SpellGrowth, and growth augments as you iterate.
// Enabled: Master toggle for EmpyreanAlteration (default true). When false, mutators and quest item leveling Harmony do not run.
// Verbose: When true, extra logging for mutator and alteration diagnostics.
// ItemLevelUpGrowthEnabled: When true, applies GrowthAugments / GrowthFixedLevelAugments / AugmentGroups when items with GrowthItem level up.
// GrowthAugments: Maps WeenieType (string keys: MeleeWeapon, Caster, MissileLauncher) to AugmentGroup name applied on growth level-up.
// GrowthFixedLevelAugments: Per WeenieType, maps item level (string key) to Augment enum name granted at that level.
// LootItemMaxLevelMin: Minimum rolled max level for loot GrowthItem / LootGrowthItem.
// LootItemMaxLevelMax: Maximum rolled max level for loot growth items.
// LootItemMaxLevelRollPower: Exponent p in w=U^p for loot max-level rolls; p>1 favors lower caps.
// LootItemMaxLevelTierBias: On higher tiers, slightly relaxes low-cap bias from LootItemMaxLevelRollPower.
// EnableQuestItemLeveling: When true (default), patches quest inventory XP init, custom item XP curves, catch-up growth, and OnItemLevelUp growth while the mod is Enabled (Harmony category EmpyreanAlterationQuestItemGrowth). Slot-specific outcomes and weights are tuned via QuestGrowthSalvageRules, SpellGrowth, and growth engine settings as development continues.
// EnableQuestItemWorkmanship: When true (default), rolls workmanship on the same first-inventory pass as quest XP init (fake bool 40107). Overtinked skips duplicate workmanship when 40107 is set.
// QuestItemXpBase: Base XP for quest items when ItemXpCurveMode is AceGeometric.
// QuestItemXpScale: Per-tier scale applied to QuestItemXpBase for quest init.
// QuestItemMaxLevelMin: Rolled cap minimum for quest-given items (inventory init).
// QuestItemMaxLevelMax: Rolled cap maximum for quest-given items.
// QuestItemMaxLevelRollPower: Exponent p in w=U^p for quest max-level rolls.
// UseFixedGlobalItemMaxLevel: When true, ItemMaxLevel uses GlobalItemMaxLevel when greater than 0 for quest rolls.
// GlobalItemMaxLevel: Fixed cap when UseFixedGlobalItemMaxLevel is true.
// GlobalItemXpPlayerScale: Legacy geometric: scales ItemBaseXp when ItemXpCurveMode is AceGeometric.
// QuestItemMaxLevelTier: Tier passed into quest max-level roll.
// ItemXpGeometricFirstLevelTotal: Geometric mode: total XP to reach item level 1 from 0.
// ItemXpGeometricMultiplierPerStep: Geometric mode: per-level multiplier on the first-level step.
// ItemMaxLevelsPerTreasureTier: Tier scaling step when UseTierScaledItemMaxLevel is true.
// ItemXpCurveMode: AceGeometric, CharacterTable, or Geometric (string in JSON).
// ItemXpVirtualCharacterLevel: Character XP table anchor for CharacterTable mode.
// ItemXpCharacterCurveMultiplier: Multiplies character per-level deltas in CharacterTable mode.
// ItemXpDummyBaseXp: Dummy ItemBaseXp when CharacterTable or Geometric.
// QuestGrowthSalvageRules: Salvage-like tinker rules for quest item level-up growth (same shape as Overtinked SalvageRules; duplicate WCIDs for quest-reward pairs).
// QuestGrowthMaxImbueEffects: Cap on imbue effect bits for quest growth level-up imbue rolls.
// SpellGrowth: Spell and cantrip growth on quest-growth item level-up.
// WeaponQuestGrowth: Quest weapons: deterministic elemental rend first, 5% extra imbues, ordered spell ladder, equal stat rolls, minor outcome pool.

QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// Wcids: Both normal and quest-reward WCIDs so behavior is consistent.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// EffectKind: Kind of effect: Damage, ArmorLevel, etc.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// MinValue: Random range low (inclusive). Ignored if FixedValue is set.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// FixedValue: If set, use this value instead of rolling.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// Enabled: When false, this salvage rule is skipped.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.Name: Iron

SpellGrowth.// Enabled: Master toggle for spell/cantrip growth on item level-up.
SpellGrowth.// AutoPopulateFromDat: When true and explicit ID lists are empty, auto-populate pools from spell table.
SpellGrowth.// SpellOutcomeWeight: Relative weight when choosing a spell outcome.
SpellGrowth.// CantripOutcomeWeight: Relative weight when choosing a cantrip outcome.
SpellGrowth.// WeaponSpellIds: When non-empty, replaces auto weapon spell pools.
SpellGrowth.// ArmorOrJewelrySpellIds: Explicit spell IDs for armor/jewelry when non-empty.
SpellGrowth.// GenericSpellIds: Explicit generic spell IDs when non-empty.
SpellGrowth.// WeaponSpellNameContains: Name fragments for auto-population of weapon spells.
SpellGrowth.// ArmorOrJewelrySpellNameContains: Name fragments for auto-population of armor/jewelry spells.

WeaponQuestGrowth.// Enabled: Use ladder + stat + minor paths for quest-growth weapons (melee/missile/caster).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// SecondaryImbueChance: Chance for a non-rend secondary imbue after rend is satisfied (or no rend applies).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// SpellUpgradeChance: When spell branch runs: chance to upgrade an existing ladder spell before add.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// SpellAddChance: When spell branch runs: chance to add next missing ladder spell if upgrade did not apply.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// LowMinorOutcomeChance: After stat branch fails: gate for minor pool (cantrip, +base dmg, +damage rating, +crit damage rating).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MinorCantripWeight: Relative weight for minor cantrip sub-roll inside a successful minor outcome.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MinorFlatDamageWeight: Relative weight for +1 base Damage inside minor outcome.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MinorCritDamageWeight: Relative weight for +1 Crit Damage Rating (minor).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MinorDamageRatingWeight: Relative weight for +1 Damage Rating (minor); default equals MinorCritDamageWeight.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// OakSpeedDelta: WeaponTime reduction for Oak-equivalent stat branch outcome.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MeleeDamageVarianceTightenPercent: Melee stat branch: percent variance reduction per proc (same formula as Granite salvage DamageVariance).
